subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: To reduce greenhouse gas emissions, a building, including its domestic services, is to be capable of efficiently using energy.

callout.p: Domestic services means the basic engineering systems of a house that use energy or control the use of energy; and—

ol.li:
includes—
heating, air-conditioning, mechanical ventilation and artificial lighting; and
pumps and heaters for swimming pools and spa pools; and
heated water systems; and
onsite renewable energy equipment; but
excludes cooking facilities and portable appliances.
